news.t: Cambria and ETF Architect Announce Cambria Endowment Style ETF (ENDW); Joins TAX as Cambria's Second 351 Exchange

holdings.infoBox: BLDG is an equity ETF with a total of 81 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Treasury Obligations Fund Class X stock at 3.72%, Hudson Pacific Properties at 3.20%, Chatham Lodging Trust at 1.91%, Highwoods Properties at 1.71%, and Kilroy Realty at 1.68%.

overview.description: The Cambria Global Real Estate ETF (BLDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is actively-managed to provide exposure to the real estate sector and its related industries. Stocks are selected using Cambrias multi-factor algorithm. BLDG was launched on Sep 24, 2020 and is issued by Cambria.
